creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 166196
svn diff to update archivers/grzip (patch)

CHANGES provided by the attached svn diff (patch)

WWW
A trip to this purported web site, reveals it's a pay-per-click
site. All indications are that FreeBSD has been feeding that
pay-per-click site for ~12 years -- let's stop that. :)

MASTER_SITES
adds another mirror

MAINTAINER
while here, take maintainer-ship

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris

currently maintained by ports@ -- implicit approval
